After enabling this feature, the system: After enabling this feature, the system will create DKIM and SPF DNS records for the selected domain. If an SPF record already exists for a domain, the system will appropriately append the servers IP address to the existing record. However, the system will not modify any existing DKIM records. During this process, please do not edit any nameserver configuration files.

aaPanel Domain Name Management Center, a: aaPanel Domain Name Management Center, allowing you to unify accounts across multiple domain providers without switching DNS platforms

aaPanel Domain Name Management Center, allowing you to unify accounts across multiple domain providers without switching DNS platforms. It automates domain resolution, monitors SSL status, auto-applies/renews SSL, and centralizes domain expiration reminders. This feature significantly boosts your operational efficiency and reduces management costs
